name: Neutral Netweaver
text: Increase your Tech Level by 2. When this Program enters the Server, restore 5 HP to your leader.

name: Universal Unlinker
text: Increase your Tech Level by 1. When this Program enters the Server, target Unit loses all abilities until the end of the turn, then draw a card.

name: Versatile Vector
text: Increase your Tech Level by 2. When this Program enters the Server, return one Hack or Unit card from your Scrapyard to hand.

name: Wandering Ninja
text: Evasion: Once per turn when this Unit takes damage, flip a coin, if you win prevent that damage. When this Unit attacks, it deals 1 damage to the enemy Leader.

name: Techno Mage
text: Once per turn pay 2 Tech Points, target Unit gains +3 ATK and gains Charge until the end of turn.

name: Silent Sniper
text: Stealth: Untargetable by abilities and attacks as long as this Unit has not attacked. When this Unit enters the Server, it deals 3 damage to another target Unit.

name: Rogue Mech Pilot
text: Charge: This Unit may attack the same turn it enters the Server.

name: Nomad Hacker
text: When this Unit attacks Scramble 1 an enemy Unit.

name: Gun for Hire
text: When this Unit enters the Server, it deals 2 damage to any target. Pay 5 Tech Points and deal 2 damage to any Target.

name: Galactic Gladiator
text: Quantum Strike: This Unit may attack two Units per turn. When this Unit attacks, it deals 3 damage to the enemy Leader.

name: Cyber Monk
text: Reboot: When this Unit goes to the Scrapyard from the Server, return it to the Server and it gains when this Unit dies remove it from the game.

name: Beast Tamer
text: When this Unit enters the Server, create a 2/2 Cyberbeast Unit token. Recover 1: This Unit gains 1 HP at the start of your turn only to its max HP.

name: Battle Engineer
text: Shield: Once per turn when this Unit takes damage, prevent it. When this Unit enters the Server, target Unit gains Shield until the end of your next turn.

name: Neutral Nano-Armor
text: Equip: This Unit gains +2 HP. At the beginning of each turn, restore 1 HP to this Unit.

name: Modular Mantle
text: Equip: This Unit gains +2 ATK and +2 HP. Whenever this Unit destroys another Unit, draw a card.

name: Versatile Vibroblade
text: Equip: This Unit gains +3 ATK. Whenever this Unit attacks, it deals 1 damage to all enemy Units.

name: Adaptive Augments
text: Equip: This Unit gains +2 ATK, +2 HP, and your choice of either Charge, Booster, Shield, or Recover 1.

name: Network Override
text: Take control of an enemy Unit until the end of your next turn. If the Unit does not have Charge, it may not attack.

name: Code Corruption
text: Destroy target Unit.

name: Neutralizer Virus
text: All Units your opponent controls lose all abilities until your next turn.

name: Stealth Directive
text: Your Units gain Stealth until the end of your next turn.

name: Reinforcements
text: Draw 2 cards. Create two 1/1 Free Agent Unit tokens.
